literal: that is acceptable or satisfactory to some extent
a person or entity that is loyal and supportive in all situations
money regarded as a powerful or influential object
at or around a particular time or date
of the type of or resembling something
a driver who accelerates to pass through a changing traffic signal
the social ideal that success is attainable through hard work
a financial obligation that metaphorically strangles the borrower

relabelled_senses.definition: An informal tag appended to include additional unspecified things, people, or details; equivalent to 'and so on' or 'and everything else'.
A phrase referring to the various matters, events, or circumstances just mentioned; 'all these things' or 'everything described'.
Used after a verb in colloquial speech to link sequential or coordinated actions (e.g., 'go and change'), functioning like 'and then' or 'and'.
Appended to a number to indicate that the count, total, or elapsed time is still increasing and has not yet ended.
An exclamatory tag meaning 'indeed', 'you bet', or 'very much so', used to express strong agreement or emphasis.
A forceful intensifier appended to a statement to indicate seriousness, certainty, or lack of ambiguity; equivalent to 'and I am not joking' or 'this is definite'.
A coarse, colloquial tag used like 'and other things' or 'and so on' to indicate additional unspecified items or matters.
Used to indicate the continuation of a list by implying other similar items; synonymous with 'and so on' or 'etc.'
A phrase used to indicate that a list continues with other similar items; synonymous with 'and so forth' and 'etc.'
Used to indicate other things of the same kind or nature; roughly equivalent to 'and similar things' or 'and so on'.
Used to refer to things or people of a similar kind; synonymous with 'and similar things' or 'and so forth'.
